required_contains.text: Ordinary subnet markets also have a token side. Subnet documentation describes TAO reserves, alpha
reserves, and alpha outstanding as part of subnet tokenomics, while emissions documentation connects
TAO and alpha emissions to subnet reward flow
The Root Subnet is outside that alpha-token side because Subnet Zero has no alpha currency. Root
staking remains TAO-denominated, so Root Subnet market language should not be read as implying a
separate alpha reserve or alpha outstanding balance

forbidden_contains.text: Subnet markets also have a token side. Subnet documentation describes TAO reserves, alpha reserves,
and alpha outstanding as part of subnet tokenomics, while emissions documentation connects TAO and
alpha emissions to subnet reward flow
